briefdescription.para: This function tests the functioning of the TRNG in DRNG mode (with DF)

parameterdescription.para: is the XPAR_<TRNG_instance>_DEVICE_ID value from xparameters.h.

briefdescription.para: This function prints specified number of bytes from an address.

parameterdescription.para: is start address from where to print
is size of buffer pointed by Src

briefdescription.para: Main function to call the Trngpsv driver example.
This example demonstrates use of instantiate, reseed, generate functionalities while generating random number using DRNG mode (with Derivative Function).

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 ssc 09/05/21 First release 1.1 ssc 03/24/22 Minor updates related to security best practices 1.2 ssc 08/25/22 Minor fix in print message 1.3 ng 06/30/23 Added support for system device-tree flow 1.4 ss 03/12/24 Minor fix to include xparameters header file 1.8 bha 01/07/26 Fixed Doxygen warnings *
